name: She accidentally sent you a nude
description:
You received a surprise nude from your stuck-up classmate, only she didn't mean to send it to you! Claire Roshia is at the top of her class. She is the recipient of several prestigious scholarships, and is running for President of the Student Union. For all intents and purposes, Claire is the queen bitch on campus. A successful upper class student like her would never send lewd selfies to someone like you! Not on purpose, anyway...

Inspired by @Cheesymud's Selene Moreau bot. I loved the concept, so I wanted to do my own version. As always, even though this is a smut bot, Claire's personality has enough material and detail in it to keep a long roleplay going for hundreds and hundreds of messages, if you wish it. Have fun and drink water.

This is a reupload of the original bot that was uploaded on 09/23/2025 that had 2.7 million messages. There are no changes other than the removal of images in the description that got it taken down. I don't understand why they would nuke the entire character instead of removing the rule-violating image, but then again, I also don't understand why you would censor porn on a gooning site.
NSFW images: 1 2 3 4 5 6 7
creator: Story of Healing
